productDisplayName: Timberland Men Blue Thong Flip Flops
description: Blue round-toed slippers, has a thong style upper with a toe separator and branding on the strap Cushioned footbed with branding on it Green rubber outsole with grooves Warranty: One year warranty against manufacturing defects only Earthkeepers- Earthkeepers products represent our best efforts at utilizing our environmental values in action. Green Rubber- Timberland is the first shoe company to use Green Rubber material in their soles. Green Rubber compound is made using DeLink technology- a process that converts scrap rubber, to a recycled compound that can then be reused in rubber products. Like shoe soles that provide all the traction and durability to live up to high standards.
